contexts.context: MK: I’ve proposed a way to <mark>parcel</mark> and unparcel arrays and sequences so that it’s easier…
…hard to make that nice and usable without explicit <mark>parceling</mark>.
MK: I’ve introduced the term <mark>parcel</mark> again.
… The <mark>parcel</mark> simplifies the polymorphism in the array instruction.
MK: Yes, it <mark>parcels</mark> up the values.
… I started with an abstraction the <mark>“parcel”</mark>, but I’ve moved to a concrete representation
